  7. Reiwa 7 (令和7年)

Reiwa 7 in Western Calendar — 令和7年 西暦

令和7年は西暦何年？ — What year is 令和7年?

Reiwa 7 (令和7年) is 2025 in the Western Gregorian calendar. Use the converter below to look up any date in Reiwa 7, or convert other era years.

Western Year
Japanese
English
Full Date
Day of Week

Reiwa 7 Calendar Reference (令和7年 早見表)

Reiwa 7 (令和7年) Western Date Notes
令和7年1月1日1 January 2025Wednesday — New Year's Day
令和7年2月1日1 February 2025Saturday
令和7年3月1日1 March 2025Saturday
令和7年4月1日1 April 2025Tuesday
令和7年5月1日1 May 2025Thursday
令和7年6月1日1 June 2025Sunday
令和7年7月1日1 July 2025Tuesday
令和7年8月1日1 August 2025Friday
令和7年9月1日1 September 2025Monday
令和7年10月1日1 October 2025Wednesday
令和7年11月1日1 November 2025Saturday
令和7年12月1日1 December 2025Monday

About Reiwa 7 (令和7年)

Reiwa 7 is the seventh year of the Reiwa era (令和), Japan's current imperial era. In the Western Gregorian calendar, Reiwa 7 corresponds to the full year 2025 — from January 1 to December 31. The Reiwa era began on May 1, 2019, when Emperor Naruhito ascended to the Chrysanthemum Throne following the abdication of Emperor Akihito.

To convert any Reiwa year to a Western year, use the simple formula: Reiwa year + 2018 = Western year. For Reiwa 7: 7 + 2018 = 2025. This formula works for all years in the Reiwa era.

How to Write Reiwa 7 in Japanese (令和7年の書き方)

In Japanese, Reiwa 7 is written as 令和7年 or 令和七年 using kanji numerals. On official documents, forms, and government paperwork in Japan, the era year format is standard. If you are filling out a Japanese form that asks for your birth year or the current year, you may need to write 令和7年 rather than 2025.

For other Reiwa years, see: Reiwa 6 (2024), Reiwa 5 (2023), or use the full era date converter to convert any Japanese era date.

Era date information sourced from the Japan Cabinet Office.

Frequently Asked Questions — Reiwa 7

  • What year is Reiwa 7 in the Western calendar?
    Reiwa 7 (令和7年) is 2025 in the Western Gregorian calendar. The Reiwa era began on May 1, 2019, so Reiwa year 7 plus 2018 equals 2025. Reiwa 7 runs from January 1, 2025 to December 31, 2025.
  • How do I convert Reiwa 7 to a Western year?
    To convert Reiwa 7 to a Western year, add 2018 to the Reiwa year number: 7 + 2018 = 2025. This formula works for any Reiwa year. For example, Reiwa 1 + 2018 = 2019, Reiwa 6 + 2018 = 2024, Reiwa 8 + 2018 = 2026.
  • What day of the week is January 1, Reiwa 7?
    January 1, Reiwa 7 (令和7年1月1日) falls on a Wednesday. In Western calendar terms, this is January 1, 2025. Use the era date converter above to check the day of the week for any Reiwa 7 date.
